Industrial Equipment

ABOUT US

We Deliver Exceptional Results

C&M Pinnacle was founded in January 2022, registered in the Republic of Ghana as a 100% Ghanaian-owned business operating in the general engineering services space. 

C&M specializes in mechanical installation (offshore, onshore, and mining), maintenance works, and civil engineering.

Read More
Read More

13 YEARS OF EXPERIENCE

ABOUT US

Growing from its inception as a department in 2009, C&M Pinnacle was restructured on January 2022 with a full registration in the Republic of Ghana as a 100% Ghanaian-owned business operating in the general engineering services space with specialization in civil & building engineering, mechanical installations and engineering labour supply.

Our Vision

To build a strong fabrication and civil engineering company with representation in 10 African countries by 2032.

Professionals in Construction

We are a network of skilled professionals who drive transformative and sustainable infrastructure development throughout the continent.

99.9% Customer Satisfaction based on 350+ reviews

13 Years Expert in Engineering

13 Years of Experience

About C&M Pinnacle

We Always Deliver Exceptional Result

C&M Pinnacle was founded in January 2022, registered in the Republic of Ghana as a 100% Ghanaian-owned business operating in the general engineering services space. C&M specializes in mechanical installation (offshore, onshore, and mining), maintenance works, and civil engineering.

Read More

Projects

Projects
recent works

Projects

Do you have a project to discuss? Let’s Chat
Construction

Goldfields Tennis Court

Elevating sports infrastructure with top-tier construction and security features, the Goldfields Tennis Court project combines expert craftsmanship with cutting-edge materials.

Find out more
Construction

Goldfields Retaining Wall

Completed the Goldfields Retaining Wall project, featuring precision land grading, high-strength prefabricated steel reinforcement, and expert construction craftsmanship.

Find out more
Construction

GB Foods Full Renovation

Revitalized Gb Foods with a comprehensive renovation, including precise site grading, block wall construction, and expertly laid pavement

Find out more
Construction

Vihema Tank Farm

Enhancing infrastructure with precision, the Vihema Tank Farm project exemplifies advanced construction techniques and strategic design for optimal water storage and management.

Find out more
Construction

Wapco Land Reclaim

Reviving and optimizing land use, the Wapco Land Reclaim project demonstrates our expertise in land reclamation and effective resource management.

Find out more
Construction

Upfield Tank Construction

Showcasing expert craftsmanship and meticulous planning, the Upfield Tank Construction project delivers a high-quality solution for reliable and durable storage.

Find out more

Asanko Works

Steel Installations

Featured

explore the features

Steel Fabrication

This involves cutting, welding, and finishing steel elements to exact specifications before they are installed.

explore the features

Steel Erection

we ensure that the framework is robust and reliable, setting a solid foundation for the entire construction.

explore the features

Maintenance

This includes regular inspections, preventive maintenance, and necessary repairs to address issues like corrosion

We Are Committed
to Excellence

01

Zero Safety Incident

We demonstrate a history of maintaining safety standards without any incidents.

02

Tailored Solutions

We work together with our clients to achieve the expected results for each client.

03

High Quality Build

We maintain meticulous standards in every aspect of the build

04

Modern Equipment

We use modern technology that fuels our efficiency and allows us to build smarter.

05

Unique Ideas

We use innovative design principles to develop sustainable solutions

Featured Service

Steel Works

At C&M Pinnacle, we specialize in delivering top-quality steel works that form the backbone of your construction projects. Our steel solutions are designed to meet the highest standards of strength and resilience, ensuring that every structure we build is reliable and long-lasting

Testimonials

Testimonials

Pople
CEO, Upfield

David J. Haines

I truly appreciate the dedication and effort that C&M Pinnacle invests in their deliverables. Their commitment to quality and excellence is evident. I am pleased with the results and the service they provide.

CEO, VRA

Emmanuel Antwi Darkwa

I enjoy working with C&M Pinnacle Engineering. Their professionalism, attention to detail, and commitment to excellence make every interaction positive. It’s been a pleasure, and I value our strong partnership.

CEO, GWCL

Clifford A. Braimah

I was impressed by the moling service from C&M Pinnacle Engineering. The project was timely and exceeded my expectations. Their expertise and efficiency were evident, and the results were outstanding.

Managing Director, GTP

Kofi Boateng

C&M Pinnacle Engineering did an exceptional job. Their work was meticulous, exceeding our expectations and showcasing their expertise and commitment to quality. The results were impressive and greatly appreciated.

MD, Voltic Ghana

Flora Jika

The work was completed on time, and I was very pleased with the results. Their timely delivery, high-quality workmanship, and professionalism exceeded my expectations

Services

WHO NEEDS OUR SERVICE
Service

01

Oil & Gas Industry

We specialize in designing and constructing robust infrastructure tailored to the unique demands of the oil and gas industry.

02

Mining Sector

We understand the challenges of the mining sector and offer bespoke engineering services to optimize productivity and safety.

03

Industrial Space

We are experts in building safe and functional facilities for heavy industry and we handle the entire process from planning to finish.

VIEW ALL
What services do you offer?

We provide a comprehensive range of services including project management, civil engineering design, construction supervision, and infrastructure development.

How do you handle project timelines?

We ensure timely delivery by using detailed planning, regular progress monitoring, and effective resource management.

Can you work on custom projects?

Yes, we specialize in tailoring solutions to meet unique project requirements, ensuring each project aligns with our clients’ specific needs and objectives.

How do you handle cost estimation?

We provide detailed cost estimates based on the project's scope, materials, and labor, ensuring transparency and adherence to the budget.

C&M Pinnacle

Our goal is to bring exceptional quality in industrial welding and Civil Works to clients in a high-opportunity emerging and frontier markets around Africa
